titleStmt.title: SII 40.148: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 148. (A.R. No. B. 282 of 1931.) Telikicherla, Tadepalligudem Taluk, West Godavari District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a pillar planted in front of the Veṅkaṭēśvarasvāmi temple in the village.
Records the gift of land granted to the various servants of the temple of Nārāyaṇēśvara. In characters of the 12th century A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatteliki ceṟuvuna
nārāyaṇēśvara śrī mahādēvara
ku muppadireṁḍu jēna kōlaṁgolacina
jenada polamu gona siṁggamuna
ṁ buṭṭeṁḍu . tamalaṁpūṁḍiṁ
buṭṭeṁḍu Ātara golanaṁbu
ṭeṁḍu muḍu [Ā]raṁ buṭṭeṁḍu
koṁḍapallini puṭṭeṁḍu . padupū
ṁḍiṁbuṭṭeṁḍu cenu raṁbuṭṭeṁ
pasuṁḍūraṁ buṭṭeṁḍu . Eṟṟa
raṁbuṭṭeṁḍu . pakki ṟelaṁbuṁṭṭe
ṁḍu . maṁḍūraṁ buṭṭeṁḍu .
maripūṁḍiṁ buṭṭeṁḍu . puṭṭa
buṭṭeṁḍu . baḍḍapaṭṭaṁ buṭṭeṁḍu
koḍūraṁ buṭṭeṁḍu . sāni mā
ni nibaṁdhakāṟlajītalu . mera
ri jītamu reṁḍu māḍalakuṁ
bolamu . patri jītamu reṁḍu
māḍalakuṁ bolamu . maddela
kāni jītamu reṁḍu māḍala
kuṁ bolamu Āvajakāni
tamu reṁḍu māḍalaku bola
mūvaṁsakāni jītamu reṁḍu
māḍalakuṁ bolamu . sānula
ku Okkokaḍlaku jītamu māḍa
kuṁ bolamulu . paṁcamahāśa
bdamulavārikinni Okkokkaḍla jīta
mu māḍakuṁ bolamulu . tani
paṁvālavāriniṁ golupiṁcemē
nāyakuni jītamu reṁḍu vu
ṭlasēnu . nārāyaṇēśvara śrī mahā
dēvaranaṁ jeṁbarivārayaṁ Ālemi sē
sina śilpi sūḍācāryyunikiṁ bu
ṭṭeṁḍu sēnu . Ī dēvara prāsādama
ṁ brākāramuṁ gōpuramuṁjēsina
komarācāryyunikiṁ buṭṭeṁḍu
sēnu . Ī śāsanamunaṁdunna vrittulu
Ī dēvara nibadhālavāri jītālakuṁ
nu peṭṭedi dīniki Evvaru vilaṁbamu
sēsirēni peddagaṁggakaṟuta vēyi ga
vilaṁ boḍicina Aṁtta pāpamunaṁ bō
duru peddakoḍuku kapālamu
naṁ guḍicina Aṁtta pāpamu . ni
dhālavāri jītālu veṭṭimi girina
dēvaraku bhaṁḍāramu
Digital edition of SII 40.148 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
